---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that Forge makes hard or impossible today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like Forge to do. If it touches a CLI verb, the Workbench, or the
plan/run/review/ship flow, say where it fits.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches or workarounds you've tried or thought about.

## Additional context

Anything else — related ADRs (`docs/adr/`), prior discussion, examples from
other tools, etc.
